title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source solution that creates knowledge graphs from large code bases without requiring RAG, addressing memory constraints in code analysis tasks. It enables more accurate, token-efficient responses by organizing code information into structured graph format.
